info.name: Nyra Backend API
info.description: Postman collection for Nyra backend APIs: auth, public catalog, coupons, admin commerce (orders, customers, promotions, dashboard, analytics, order statuses), and catalog writes.

request.description: Health check endpoint.
Requires an existing admin user mapped to the phone number.
Requires any authenticated user. Use `userToken` from user OTP verify, or `adminToken` for admin profile.
Active brands only. Default limit 50, max 200.
brandKey: brd_* id or slug string.
Optional query: parentId (cat_*), or root=true. Default limit 100, max 500.
categoryKey: cat_* id or slug.
Published, public products. Optional filters categoryId / brandId (prefixed ids). Default limit 24, max 100.
productKey: prd_* or SEO slug.
List published collections (ordered by displayPriority). Pagination matches other catalog list endpoints.
Fetch a published collection by slug segment (e.g. summer-essentials → stored as /collections/summer-essentials).
collectionKey: prefixed id (col_*) or slug segment. Response includes products[] in catalog product shape.
Public. Code normalized to uppercase. Includes isValid and invalidReason.
Optional query active=true|false
204 on success
targetType + targetId optional together: collection | product | category. targetId is numeric DB id.
CSV attachment
CSV; same filter query params as list
IDs are numeric DB ids. Adjust customer_id, status_id, product_id to match your DB.
status_id must exist in order-statuses config.
Admin detail view with available_statuses, payment, shipping_address, etc.
JSON payload until PDF invoice is implemented.
204. Replace ids with real status ids from GET list.
CSV
204. Cannot delete system statuses or statuses in use.
Multipart request. Use `logo` and `banner` file fields for Cloudflare R2 upload. URL fields are fallback if no file is sent.
Full replacement of editable brand fields. Multipart is also supported by the API (same as create).
Multipart request. Use `thumbnail` and `banner` file fields for Cloudflare R2 upload. URL fields are fallback if no file is sent.
parentCategoryId optional string cat_* or null. Multipart also supported.

formdata.value: {"slug":"air-zoom-runner","metaTitle":"Air Zoom Runner Shoes","metaDescription":"High-performance running shoes for daily training."}

request.description: Multipart request. Use repeated `media` file fields for image upload to Cloudflare R2. Use `mediaJson` to include existing non-image media URLs (for example videos).

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Air Zoom Runner",
  "description": "Lightweight running shoes",
  "brandId": "{{brandId}}",
  "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
  "basePrice": 4999,
  "discountPrice": 4299,
  "hasSpecialDiscount": true,
  "discountExpiry": "2026-12-31T18:30:00Z",
  "sku": "AIR-ZOOM-RUNNER-001",
  "stockQuantity": 50,
  "isOutOfStock": false,
  "media": [],
  "variants": [
    {"name": "size", "values": ["7", "8", "9", "10"]},
    {"name": "color", "values": ["black", "white"]}
  ],
  "seo": {
    "slug": "air-zoom-runner",
    "metaTitle": "Air Zoom Runner Shoes",
    "metaDescription": "High-performance running shoes for daily training."
  },
  "status": {
    "isPublished": true,
    "visibility": "public",
    "scheduledAt": null
  }
}

request.description: Full replacement fields. Multipart also supported (same as create).
Slug can be omitted to auto-generate from name (/collections/kebab-name). Updates use PATCH (not PUT) to match other admin catalog resources.
Admin list: all collections (draft + published). items include products: [] (empty on list).
Single collection with products[] (full product rows for admin).
204 No Content on success.
Products in collection only (JSON shape matches catalog product list).
Idempotent adds (duplicate pairs ignored). 204 No Content on success.
204 No Content on success.
